name: Kids Snackin' Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Pop the corn using an air popper without added fat to reduce calories.
2. Over low heat, melt the butter or margarine with peanut butter until smooth.
3. Drizzle the melted mixture over the popcorn and mix well.
4. Spread the popcorn in a shallow baking pan.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes, stirring 2 or 3 times to ensure even coating.
6. The corn will crisp up and the topping will set.
Enjoy! American Diabetes Approved
